name: STOA AI Factory — Slack Interactive Handler

parameters.responseBody: ={ "error": "Unauthorized — invalid signature or user not allowed" }

meta.notes:
Slack Interactive Handler for STOA AI Factory.

Handles button clicks from Block Kit messages (approve ticket, approve plan, merge PR).
Validates Slack request signature (HMAC-SHA256) — pattern adapted from n8n-approve-ticket.json.

Access control tiers:
  - admin (SLACK_ADMIN_USERS): all actions including scan/implement
  - allowed (SLACK_ALLOWED_USERS): approve + merge only
  - readonly (everyone else): 403 forbidden
  - Backward compatible: empty SLACK_ADMIN_USERS = all allowed users are admins

Required environment variables (Docker Compose .env):
  - SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET: Slack app signing secret
  - SLACK_ALLOWED_USERS: Comma-separated Slack user IDs (optional — empty = allow all)
  - SLACK_ADMIN_USERS: Comma-separated Slack user IDs for admin tier (optional)

Required credentials:
  - GitHub PAT (httpHeaderAuth, id: github-pat)

Action routing:
  - approve_ticket:<issue_num> → POST /go comment on GitHub issue
  - approve_plan:<issue_num>   → POST /go-plan comment on GitHub issue
  - merge_pr:<pr_num>          → PUT merge (squash) on GitHub PR
  - scan_backlog:*             → admin-only (future: trigger scan)
  - trigger_implement:*        → admin-only (future: trigger implementation)
  - unknown                    → 200 OK (ignore)
